name: fastaicode-image-mcp
description: Reusable local MCP plugin for FastAICode image generation.

interface.shortDescription: Generate images and save local PNG files.
interface.longDescription: Provides a local MCP tool for FastAICode-compatible image generation with standardized presets, decoding, and file output.
defaultPrompt: Generate a product mockup image and save it locally.
Create an illustration with the FastAICode image tool.
Render an image at 1k and return the saved path.
